Euphorbia is a genus of flowering plants in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae), comprising over 2,000 species. The health benefits of Euphorbia include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, combat infections, and protect against oxidative stress.
